description: Composition Red and orange V-neck check shirt made of 100% cotton, has roll over sleeves with mid-arm button, a spread collar, buttoned placket, a belt, embroidered branding above the hem, pin tucks that flare out at the waist and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to fashion-oriented career women. This shirt from arrow is a tried-and-true favourite with an easy, drapey silhouette that enhances your curves. Pair it with formal trousers, closed toe pumps and a vibrant scarf. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
